THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT DEFENDANT RECOVER FROM PLAINTIFF LIN, JOHN K.C. JUDGMENT ORDERED IN FAVOR OF DEFT. RUSSELL I. KASSMAN; PLTF TO TAKE NOTHING ON HIS COMPLAINT & THAT THE COMPLAINT SHALL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. JUDGMENT IS HEREBY ORDERED IN FAVOR OF CROSS-COMPLAINANT RUSSELL I. KASSMAN AND AGAINST CROSS-DEFENDANT JOHN K.C. LIN FOR $874.50 & COSTS AND ATTORNEY FEES PER COST BILL. (SEE JUDGMENT IN FILE FOR MORE DETAIL)

OSC CALENDAR OF MAR-14-2001, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY HELLESTO RICHARD HEARING SET FOR APR-25-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

JUDGE DIANE WICK; CLERK-BETH WILBER; REPORTER-BRENDA FIELDS: C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. PAUL MELBOSTAD APPEARS FOR DEFENDANT & CROSS COMPLAINANT. DEFENDANT R. KASSMAN IS ALSO PRESENT; NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT OR DEFT'S ATTY. RICHARD A. HELLESTO. MR. MELBOSTAD MOVES FOR A NON-SUIT ON PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT AND THE COURT GRANTS THE MOTION. MR. MELBOSTAD THEN PRESENTS CASE FOR DEFENDANT & CROSS-COMPLAINT BY CALLING WITNESSES; TAKING TESTIMONY AND INTRODUCING EVIDENCE. MR. MELBOSTAD THEN RESTS AND THE COURT RULES FOR THE DEFENDANT & THE CROSS-COMPLAINANT. EVIDENCE IS RETURNED AND MR. MELBOSTAD IS TO PREPARE THE JUDGMENT. (MR. MELBOSTAD IS ASKED TO POST $90.00 IN PER DIEM FEES FOR THE AM SESSION)
